title: Touched the "touch"
content:
I got a chance to touch the new [iPod touch](http://www.apple.com/ipodtouch/) yesterday.

Extremeeeeeee ... ! (แปลว่า สุดยอดดดดดดดดด คงไม่ผิดครับ)

You know what, if it isn't for the [iPhone](http://www.apple.com/iphone/), I'd have bought the [touch](http://www.apple.com/ipodtouch/) immediately!

My "I-want-the-iPhone" spirit got recharged once again. :D

By the way, I did buy a stick of 2GB RAM for my Macbook Pro. So the machine now have 3GB and I'm left with one unused 1GB RAM. I wish I can use it with my very own brain. --"
